title: Simplify README onboarding
summary: The README now leads with the published npx installer and clearly explains that repository Snapshots, the UI, and HTTP MCP run locally from the target repository.
userVisibleChange: Users now get one concise npx-first setup path and explicit instructions to run eve dev inside the repository they want to inspect.

decisions.title: Keep installation global while describing UI and MCP execution as repository-local

validation.command: git diff --check and documentation link checks (passed)
